children.text:
app at Rich
mond, CA, United States on 12-18-2016
Listen as birds, insects, and other wildlife of the Amazon sing their songs amidst a gently babbling stream.
The lapping of gentle ocean waves along the seashore is both calming and relaxing.
A small camp fire cracks dryly in the cool fall air, providing a blanket of warmth to those standing close enough.
Ocean waves are whipped, stirred, and churned up by the forceful wind whose gale knows no bounds.
The long and low sound of howling wind is perfect to block out life’s distractions.
This thunderstorm has a little rain, rolling thunder, and the occasional thunder strike which is great by itself or mixed with other sounds.

Listen from the dry safety of inside a car as rain falls steadily on the roof. Like many popular sounds, it's difficult to pinpoint exactly what makes it so relaxing since the sound means different things to each listener. Perhaps it's nothing more than the idea of sitting peacefully with the car parked and the ignition off, arrested by the metallic sound of raindrops hammering overhead.
The perfect storm with rain, rumbling thunder, and wind. It's the perfect combination of nature's elements.
A gentle rain shower falls in the woods while birds chirp and sing.
